scripts.package-windows: set GOWORK=off && lerna run package && tools\collect-dist.bat
scripts.integration: cd test && pnpm edge:install && ./run-against-dist pnpm exec jest --runInBand
scripts.integration:update: cd test && pnpm install --ignore-workspace && pnpm edge:install && NODE_OPTIONS='--max-old-space-size=7168' ./run-against-dist pnpm exec jest -u --runInBand
scripts.integration:typescript: cd test && ./run-against-dist pnpm exec jest --runInBand typescript
scripts.integration:python: cd test && ./run-against-dist pnpm exec jest --runInBand python
scripts.integration:csharp: cd test && ./run-against-dist pnpm exec jest --runInBand csharp
scripts.integration:java: cd test && ./run-against-dist pnpm exec jest --runInBand java
scripts.integration:go: cd test && ./run-against-dist pnpm exec jest --runInBand go
scripts.integration:windows:typescript: cd test && run-against-dist.bat "pnpm exec jest --runInBand typescript"
scripts.integration:windows:python: cd test && run-against-dist.bat "pnpm exec jest --runInBand python"
scripts.integration:windows:csharp: cd test && run-against-dist.bat "pnpm exec jest --runInBand csharp"
scripts.integration:windows:java: cd test && run-against-dist.bat "pnpm exec jest --runInBand java"
scripts.integration:windows:go: cd test && run-against-dist.bat "pnpm exec jest --runInBand go"
scripts.build-docker-jsii: docker build --platform linux/amd64 --build-arg DEFAULT_TERRAFORM_VERSION=$(cat .terraform.versions.json | jq -r '.default') --build-arg AVAILABLE_TERRAFORM_VERSIONS="$(cat .terraform.versions.json | jq -r '.available | join(" ")')" -t terraconstructs/jsii-terraform .
scripts.generate-docs:api: pnpm install && pnpm build && mkdir -p website/docs/cdktn/api-reference && cd tools/documentation-generation && pnpm install --ignore-workspace && pnpm docs && pnpm exec prettier --write ../../website/docs/cdktn/api-reference/**
scripts.generate-function-bindings: cd tools/generate-function-bindings && pnpm install && pnpm fetch-metadata && pnpm generate
